Blended with few modern features and situated amidst a rich ambiance this luxurious project is a perfect place for those seeking a lovely and peaceful abode at a very economical price. Property SpecificationsUp for sale this penthouse is comparatively a new property aged less than five years and is sited on the top floor of a fivestorey building. Wellmaintained this impeccably designed house is perfectly readytomovein. The positive aura of this vaastu complaint penthouse makes it worth buying and ideal for a blissful and cheerful living with your loved ones and is certainly not to be missedThis penthouse is attractive with two spacious bedrooms two bathrooms a beautiful kitchen three wonderful balconies overlooking to the surrounding area and a lovely covered open terrace. One of the bathroom is attached to a bedroom and one is common. Of the three balconies one is attached to a bedroom one to the hall and the third balcony adjoins the kitchen. The kitchen is impressive with a normal granite platform and sink. Flooring is finished with vitrified tiles for a clean and elegant look. FacilitiesMaintenance staffs are readily available to look after the wellbeing of this society. Reserved parking park security kids play area lift and visitor parking facilities are also provided. One covered car parking space is also available for accommodating your vehicle. Water supply to this penthouse is round the clock. For the safety of the residents the society is appointed with 24x7 manned security at the main entrance. LocalityVastral is an upcoming locality and boasts a clean and calm environment making it ideal to reside in with your family. The locality is also wellconnected via good transport facilities. Madhav Higher Secondary School Podar International School Delhi Public School and Madhav International School are in the proximity of only 3kms. Hetvi Hospital Jyoti Hospital M. B. Few banksATMs found within 1.5kms include State Bank Of India ATM ICICI BANK ATM Axis Bank ATM BOB ATM and Gujarat State Co Op Bank ATM.
